endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Consumption/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available consumption REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/usageDetails
endpoints.description: Lists the usage details for a scope in reverse chronological order by billing period. Usage details are available via this API only for January 1, 2017 or later.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
